title: Pet Import Guide: South Africa
description: Complete guide to importing your dog or cat to South Africa. Import requirements, quarantine, breed restrictions, and step-by-step process.
name: South Africa
overview: Importing a pet to South Africa is moderately strict. Here's what you need to know.

import_requirements.microchip: Required (ISO 11784/11785). Must be implanted before rabies vaccination
import_requirements.rabies_titre_test: Required for: Pets from countries without bilateral veterinary agreements
import_requirements.import_permit: Required. Must be obtained BEFORE travel. Application requires destination address in South Africa, description of pet, planned port of entry.
import_requirements.health_certificate: Official veterinary health certificate. Valid 10 days.

sections.heading: Import requirements for South Africa
sections.body:
**Microchip:** Required (ISO 11784/11785). Must be implanted before rabies vaccination

**Rabies Vaccination:** Required

**Rabies Titre Test:** Required for: Pets from countries without bilateral veterinary agreements

**Quarantine:** Not required (penalty quarantine if non-compliant)

**Import Permit:** Required. Must be obtained BEFORE travel. Application requires destination address in South Africa, description of pet, planned port of entry.

**Health Certificate:** Official veterinary health certificate. Valid 10 days.

sections.heading: Breed restrictions in South Africa
sections.body: Governed by: No national breed-specific import legislation

faqs.question: What vaccinations does my pet need to enter South Africa?
faqs.answer: At minimum, a rabies vaccination is required. Required Your pet must also be microchipped before vaccination.

faqs.question: Is there quarantine in South Africa?
Which airlines fly pets to South Africa?
faqs.answer: Multiple airlines serve pet cargo to South Africa. Check our route-specific guides for airline details on your particular origin-destination pair.
